overview: DSWithRavi is a world-class data science portfolio website for Ravi, featuring an animated hero section, detailed project case studies with interactive charts, a protected admin panel for managing projects and files, recruiter-focused sections, and a sleek dark glassmorphism design with neon blue/purple accents.
features: Animated hero with typing text effect
Projects grid with search and tag filtering
Full case study pages (Problem → Data → Approach → Results → Insights)
Interactive Recharts visualizations in project details
File upload and preview (CSV, Excel, Python, images)
Protected admin panel with Internet Identity login
Project CRUD with featured project toggles
Recruiter Hook section with animated Why Hire Me cards
Scroll reveal animations and glassmorphism UI
